Alerts Resolved:
Labels:
 - alertname = KubeDeploymentReplicasMismatch
 - cluster = google-production
 - deployment = ai-product-moderation
 - namespace = production
 - severity = warning
Annotations:
 - summary = Deployment has not matched the expected number of replicas.
